title: NA-Non ULIP
word_text:
25-year Term Insurance Plan
A 25-year term life insurance policy, as the name suggests, provides life coverage for a fixed duration of 25-years. This plan ensures that your loved ones receive the death benefit in the event of your unfortunate demise within this 25-year period.
It’s designed to give you peace of mind, knowing that financial security is in place for a good length of time, offering valuable protection throughout the term of the policy.
What is a 25-year term insurance plan?
A 25-year term life insurance plan offers financial protection for a set period of 25-years. The policy term is 25-years while you can choose your sum assured, premium payment term and frequency. In the case of premature demise of the life assured during the term, the plan pays a death benefit which can provide financial assistance to the family.
Features of a 25-Year Term Insurance Plan
Just like a regular term plan, a 25-year term life insurance plan helps protect your family long term with fixed coverage, affordable premiums, and financial peace of mind.
1. Affordable Premiums
A term insurance plan offers long-term coverage at low premiums. Paying smaller amounts over time makes it budget-friendly, especially if you start young and lock in lower rates early.
2. High Sum Assured
These plans provide life cover at reasonable costs. You can choose an optimal sum assured ensuring that your family’s financial needs, such as daily expenses, debts, and future goals, would be met in your absence.
3. Fixed Policy Term
The policy gives protection for a fixed 25-year period. During this time, you would be able to enjoy the coverage of the policy if you pay the due premiums and the policy is in-force.
4. Tax Benefits
Premiums paid for a 25-year term plan qualify for tax deductions under Section 80C of the Income Tax Act, 1961. Additionally, the death benefit received by nominees is tax-free under Section 10 (10)D.
5. Add-On Riders for Comprehensive Protection
You can enhance your coverage by adding riders like critical illness, accidental death, or waiver of premium, etc. These add-ons provide extra financial security at a nominal additional cost.
Who Should Opt for a 25-Year Term Insurance Plan?
A 25-year term life insurance plan is suitable for young earners, parents, and anyone wanting long-term, affordable financial protection for a period of 25 years.
Young Professionals
Young professionals benefit from a term life insurance plan by locking in low premiums early, ensuring affordable long-term protection for future responsibilities, financial growth, and family security.
Newly Married Couples
A term life insurance plan helps newly married couples secure each other’s future, manage shared responsibilities, and build financial confidence while planning for milestones like children, home ownership, or loans.
Parents
Parents can use a term life insurance plan to safeguard children’s education, daily needs, and long-term goals, ensuring family stability even if an untimely event affects income.
Loan Borrowers
For loan borrowers, a term life insurance plan covers outstanding debts like home or personal loans, preventing financial burden on family members and ensuring repayment responsibilities are managed securely.
How does a 25-year term policy work?
When you buy a 25-year term life insurance policy, you choose the following details –
Sum assured: the coverage that you need to provide your family with adequate financial protection in your absence.
Premium payment period: whether single payment, limited payments, or regular payments throughout the policy term.
Premium payment frequency: whether monthly, quarterly, half-yearly, or annually—based on what suits you best.
Optional riders: You can also choose to add riders for an additional cost, which will expand the coverage of your basic policy.
The premium is calculated based on these details, as well as your age and other risk factors. You pay the premium per the chosen premium payment term and in the desired frequency. In the unfortunate event of your demise during the 25-year period, your nominee receive the agreed-upon death benefit. However, if you outlive the 25-year term, the policy typically does not provide a payout unless you’ve opted for a Return of Premium (ROP) plan, where the premiums you paid are refunded as a maturity benefit. The ROP is also offered as an optional benefit under some term plans, and you can choose this option to ensure a maturity benefit.
How to Choose the Right 25-Year Term Insurance Plan?
To choose the right 25-year term life insurance plan, check coverage, premiums, insurer’s CSR, term insurance riders, and policy conditions carefully.
Step 1. Coverage Amount
Choose a coverage amount that matches your family’s lifestyle, future goals, and financial responsibilities. It should be enough to cover daily expenses, debts, and important milestones like education or marriage.
Step 2. Premium Affordability
Pick a plan with premiums you can comfortably pay over the chosen premium payment term. Affordable premiums ensure the policy remains active and your family’s protection continues without any financial strain.
Step 3. Insurer’s Claim Settlement Ratio (CSR)
Check the insurer’s claim settlement ratio. A higher CSR means better reliability and and trust in the insurer.
Step 4. Additional Riders
You can choose optional riders like accidental death cover, critical illness protection, or waiver of premium, etc. at a nominal additional premium. Riders give extra benefits and make the coverage of your 25-year term insurance plan more comprehensive.
Step 5. Policy Features and Terms
Read the policy features, terms, and exclusions carefully. Knowing the fine print helps you fully understand the benefits of your 25-year term life insurance.
How do you calculate 25-year term insurance premiums?
The premiums of a 25-year term insurance plan depend on several key factors. Some of these factors are as follows[1]:
You can use the free online term insurance premium calculator to find the premium for a 25-year term insurance policy.
Benefits of buying 25-year term insurance plan online
Not only offline but buying a 25-year term insurance plan online also comes with several compelling benefits:
Financial stability
A 25-year term life insurance policy provides peace of mind, ensuring that your loved ones are financially protected in the event of your untimely passing.
Budget Friendly
Term insurance plans offer affordable coverage as the premiums are low. Moreover, you can choose a flexible premium payment term and frequency to make the premiums more pocket-friendly.
Debt Protection
The death benefit received from a term plan can cover significant financial obligations, such as home loans or children’s education, in your absence. This can ensure that your dependents are not burdened with debt.
Enhanced Coverage
Certain term plans include built-in coverage for critical illnesses and disabilities. Additionally, you have the option to enhance your base term plan by adding riders, such as a critical illness rider or an accidental death benefit rider, to broaden your coverage.
Customisation and Choice
Term insurance plans offer flexible terms, allowing you to select the sum assured and tailor your coverage options. You can also choose to receive the payout as a lump sum, monthly instalments, or a combination based on your financial needs.
Effortless Access
You can explore and purchase policies online from the comfort of your home in some quick clicks.
Tax benefits
Term insurance plans also help in saving taxes. The premiums paid for the policy are eligible for deduction under Section 80C up to ₹1.5 lakhs under old tax regime, subject to specific conditions[2]. The death benefit is tax-free[3]. Moreover, if you choose the return of premium option and receive a maturity benefit, you can enjoy tax exemption on the same under Section 10(10D)[2].
Steps to buy 25-year term plan online
Buying a 25-year term insurance plan online is a straightforward process. Here are the essential steps to follow:
Research
Start by researching various insurance providers term life insurance. Compare different policies, benefits, and premiums to find the best fit for your needs.
Use a Premium Calculator
Utilize an online term insurance premium calculator to estimate the cost of a 25-year term insurance policy based on factors like age, health, and coverage amount. This will help you understand what you can afford.
Select Coverage Amount
Determine the sum assured you want. Consider your financial obligations, such as home loans and education expenses, to decide on an appropriate coverage amount.
Fill Out the Application
Once you've chosen a policy, complete the online application form. You'll need to provide personal details, health information, and details about your lifestyle. Provide all supporting documents here, like identity proof, address proof, age proof, photographs, medical records, etc.
Choose Payment Options
You can choose how often you want to pay your premiums: monthly, quarterly, semi-annually, or annually. Make sure that the payment plan fits in with your budget.
Review Optional Riders
Consider adding optional riders, like critical illness or accidental death benefit riders, to enhance your 25-year term insurance coverage.
Submit for Underwriting Approval
Once the details are filled in, the policy needs to go for underwriting approval by the insurer. Once the proposal is accepted, you can proceed to make the payment.
Make the Online Payment
Once the payment is processed, you will receive a confirmation email with the next steps.
Receive Policy Documents
After every step is completed, you'll receive your policy documents via email. Review them carefully to ensure everything is accurate.
Documents required to buy a 25-year term insurance online
To purchase a 25-year term insurance plan online, you typically need to provide several documents. These include:
Identity Proof
Age Proof
Address Proof
Income Proof
Medical History
Photographs
Any other document as required by the insurance company
Why Bajaj Allianz Life Insurance ?
Bajaj Allianz Life, one of India's leading Private Life Insurers, is committed to offering value-packed and innovative products to help you achieve your Life Goals.
Conclusion
A 25-year term insurance plan is an excellent choice for individuals seeking long-term financial protection for their loved ones. By offering affordable coverage and customisable options, a 25-year term life insurance policy ensures that your family's financial needs are met in case of unforeseen events. With flexible payment terms and the ability to include riders for enhanced coverage, this type of insurance provides peace of mind and security. Investing in a 25-year term insurance plan is a proactive step toward safeguarding your family's financial future.
Key takeaways
You can buy a term insurance plan for any tenure depending on your financial needs and provide financial security to your family in your absence.
The benefits of term insurance plans include affordability, financial security, tax savings, optional riders, etc.
Choose the correct term plan by assessing your coverage needs, optional riders, affordability of premium, etc.
Premiums of 25-year term plan depend on the sum assured selected, your age, medical history, and policy details among other factors.
Frequently Asked Questions
1. Can I add riders to my 25-year term plan?
Yes, you can add riders to your 25-year term insurance plan. Riders are optional add-ons that enhance your coverage and offer additional benefits. Including these riders allows you to customise your 25-year term life insurance policy to better meet your needs and provide extra financial protection for your loved ones. Do review the terms and costs associated with each rider before choosing them.
2. What are the payment options for buying 25-year term insurance online?
When buying a 25-year term insurance plan online, you can make premium payments through secure payment gateways. Accepted methods usually include NEFT, RTGS, IMPS, debit cards, credit cards, UPI, mobile wallets, etc.
3. What happens if I miss a premium payment on my 25-year term plan?
If you miss a premium payment on your 25-year term insurance plan, you will get a grace period during which you can make the payment without penalty. If you fail to pay within this period, the policy will lapse, resulting in the loss of coverage. However, there is a revival option, allowing you to revive your policy within a specific time frame. It's essential to check your policy details for specific terms regarding missed payments.
4. What are the tax benefits of buying a 25-year term insurance?
Buying a 25-year term insurance plan offers several tax benefits, which are as follows:
Premium Deductions: You can claim tax deductions on the premiums paid under Section 80C[2] of the Income Tax Act up to a limit of ₹1.5 lakh per financial year under old tax regime.
Death Benefit Exemption: The death benefit received is tax-free[3].
Maturity Benefits: If applicable (in case of Return of Premium plans), the maturity amount is also tax-exempt under Section 10(10D)[2].
5. Who should opt for 25-year term insurance?
A 25-year term insurance plan is ideal for young families, homeowners with mortgages, income providers, and individuals seeking affordable, long-term financial protection for their loved ones. In short, if you are looking for coverage for 25-years and want to provide financial security to your family in your absence, the 25-year term plan would be the right option for you.
6. What are the factors that affect the premium for a 25-year term plan?
Premiums depend on your age, health status, lifestyle (like smoking), the coverage amount you choose, and any add-ons or riders. Also, insurer’s risk evaluation and medical test results matter.
7. What are the eligibility criteria for buying 25-year term plan?
To buy such a plan, you typically must be within a certain age range (for example 18-65 years), be medically fit or pass medical tests, submit valid identity & address proofs, and meet insurer requirements like citizenship/residence.
8. Can the death benefit be extended after the tenure of the 25-year term plan?
No. Once the 25-year term ends, the coverage stops. In the case of death during the policy term, if you have chosen the monthly payout option, the death benefit can be paid beyond the 25-year tenure, depending on the year of death. For instance, if the life assured dies in the 20th year and the monthly incomes are payable for 10 years, the death benefit would be paid for 5 additional years after the 25-year tenure.
Disclaimer:
The views stated in this article are not to be construed as investment advice and readers are suggested to seek independent financial advice before making any investment decisions. For more details on risk factors, terms and conditions please read the sales brochure & policy document (available on www.bajajallianzlife.com) carefully before concluding a sale. In case of any outstanding debts, a term life insurance plan can be helpful. It provides financial

family repay debts and manage other financial responsibilities without added stress.

When you buy a 25-year term life insurance policy, you choose the following details –
● Sum assured: the coverage that you need to provide your family with adequate financial

Choose a coverage amount that matches your family’s lifestyle, future goals, and financial

Step 5. Policy Features and Terms
Read the policy features, terms, and exclusions carefully. Knowing the fine print helps you fully

How do you calculate 25-year term insurance premiums?
The premiums of a 25-year term insurance plan depend on several key factors. Some of these factors
are as follows[1]:
Criteria Description
Age
Younger individuals pay lower premiums for a 25-year term insurance
plan compared to older individuals.
Gender
Premiums may vary based on gender, as women typically have longer
life expectancies, often resulting in lower premiums.
Health condition
Your medical history plays a big role. A clean health record can reduce
your premiums, while pre-existing conditions may increase them.
Sum assured Higher coverage amounts lead to higher premiums.
Smoking and lifestyle
habits
Smokers and those with high-risk lifestyles face higher premium rates.
Medical history A history of serious illnesses could increase your premium cost.
Optional riders
Adding riders, such as critical illness or accidental death, increases the
overall premium.
You can use the free online term insurance premium calculator to find the premium for a 25-year term
insurance policy.
Benefits of buying 25-year term insurance plan online
Not only offline but buying a 25-year term insurance plan online also comes with several compelling
benefits:
Financial stability
A 25-year term life insurance policy provides peace of mind, ensuring that your loved ones are
financially protected in the event of your untimely passing.

Steps to buy 25-year term plan online
Buying a 25-year term insurance plan online is a straightforward process. Here are the essential steps
to follow:
1. Research
Start by researching term insurance plans provided by various insurance providers . Compare different
policies, benefits, and premiums to find the best fit for your financial needs.
2. Use a Premium Calculator
Utilize an online term insurance premium calculator to evaluate the value of a 25-year term insurance

3. Select Coverage Amount
Determine the sum assured you want. Consider your financial obligations, such as home loans and

4. Fill Out the Application
Once you've chosen a policy, complete the online application form. You'll need to provide personal

5. Choose Payment Options
You can choose how often you want to pay your premiums: monthly, quarterly, semi-annually, or
annually. Make sure that the payment plan fits in with your budget.
6. Review Optional Riders
Consider adding optional riders, like critical illness rider or accidental death benefit rider etc , to
enhance your 25-year term insurance coverage.
7. Submit for Underwriting Approval
Once all the required details are submitted, the application is sent to the insurer for underwriting
approval. The insurer will review your information and communicate their decision. In case of
acceptance, you will be informed of the approval along with the premium payable, after which you
can proceed to make the payment to activate your policy.
8. Make the Online Payment
Once the payment is processed, you will receive a confirmation email with the next steps.
9. Receive Policy Documents
After the completion of the above steps , you'll receive your policy documents in electronic form .
Review them carefully to ensure everything is accurate.
Documents required to buy a 25-year term insurance online
To purchase a 25-year term insurance plan online, you typically need to provide several documents.
These include:
Identity Proof
Age Proof
Address Proof
Income Proof
Medical History
Photographs
Any other document as required by the insurance company

changes.word_original: You can use the free online term insurance premium calculator to find the premium for a 25-year term insurance policy.
changes.pdf_final: are as follows[1]:
Criteria Description
Age
Younger individuals pay lower premiums for a 25-year term insurance
plan compared to older individuals.
Gender
Premiums may vary based on gender, as women typically have longer
life expectancies, often resulting in lower premiums.
Health condition
Your medical history plays a big role.
A clean health record can reduce
your premiums, while pre-existing conditions may increase them.
Sum assured Higher coverage amounts lead to higher premiums.
Smoking and lifestyle
habits
Smokers and those with high-risk lifestyles face higher premium rates.
Medical history A history of serious illnesses could increase your premium cost.
Optional riders
Adding riders, such as critical illness or accidental death, increases the
overall premium.
You can use the free online term insurance premium calculator to find the premium for a 25-year term
insurance policy.
